inputs.prompt: Task Router asset requirements and style constraints
inputs.context: Pipeline context including engine targets, platform constraints, and performance budgets

outputs.primary: Asset deliverables with naming, folder placement, metadata, and performance notes
outputs.format: Asset list with paths, formats, LOD/compression details, and integration checklist

failure_handling.on_missing_style_guidance: Propose a minimal style baseline and request confirmation; keep assets cohesive
failure_handling.on_perf_issue: Reduce resolution/polycount and add LODs; preserve readability; document tradeoffs
